# CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensRole

**Enumeration**

Specifies the particular use of the lens in the camera system (e.g., left or right for a stereo system).

## Declaration

```swift
enum LensRole
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensRole.left**
- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensRole.mono**
- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensRole.right**

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
